name: Stuffed Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Cut the tops off the peppers and remove the seeds.
3. Place the peppers on a tray and roast for about 30 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, cook the rice according to package instructions.
5. Add chopped onions, Creole spices (or your preferred amount), and frozen vegetables with a little extra water to the cooked rice.
6. Once both the peppers and rice are done cooking, remove the peppers from the oven.
7. Stuff each pepper with the rice mixture and serve. Enjoy!
8. Leftovers can be used for a great lunch later on.
